\tzpentry{ID5724}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5724 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} A_\mu &= (\Phi_g, \mathbf{A}_g), \\ F_{\mu\nu} &= \partial_\mu A_\nu - \partial_\nu A_\mu. \end{align}
